eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Converse, WY; at 1:15 PM on MAR 20, 2019 Effective until 1:15 AM MAR 21, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A dam break on Fiddleback Ranch has washed out Lynch rd. There is 8 ft of water headed towards the Cheyenne River Via Water Drainages  that feed The Cheyenne River. May cause Flooding down river. Please ensure your safety from the  rising water may affect low lying structrues and livestock in the area.
